mapper.sql: CASE WHEN end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time < #{now} THEN 0 WHEN status IN ('已结束', '结束', 'CLOSED', 'ENDED', 'FINISHED', '0') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0
AND = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_activity ( id, activity_id, activity_name, start_time, end_time, status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{statusText}, 0, #{createTime}, #{createTime} ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO colonel_activity ( id, activity_id, activity_name, shop_id, shop_name, colonel_buyin_id, commission_rate, service_rate, start_time, end_time, status, last_sync_at, deleted, create_time, update_time, extra_data ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{colonelBuyinId}, #{commissionRate}, #{serviceRate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{statusText}, #{lastSyncAt}, 0, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastSyncAt}, CAST(#{extraData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB) ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id) DO UPDATE SET activity_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.activity_name, colonel_activity.activity_name), shop_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.shop_id, colonel_activity.shop_id), shop_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.shop_name, colonel_activity.shop_name), colonel_buyin_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.colonel_buyin_id, colonel_activity.colonel_buyin_id), commission_rate = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.commission_rate, colonel_activity.commission_rate), service_rate = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.service_rate, colonel_activity.service_rate), start_time = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.start_time, colonel_activity.start_time), end_time = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.end_time, colonel_activity.end_time), status = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.status, colonel_activity.status), last_sync_at = EXCLUDED.last_sync_at, extra_data = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.extra_data, colonel_activity.extra_data), deleted = 0, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT id, activity_id AS activityId, activity_name AS name, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, activity_status_code AS activityStatusCode, activity_status_text AS activityStatusText, recruiter_user_id AS recruiterUserId, recruiter_dept_id AS recruiterDeptId, assigned_at AS assignedAt, assigned_by AS assignedBy, CASE WHEN end_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 0 WHEN status IN ('已结束', '结束', 'CLOSED', 'ENDED', 'FINISHED', '0') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS status, shop_id AS shopId, shop_name AS shopName, colonel_buyin_id AS colonelBuyinId, commission_rate AS commissionRate, service_rate AS serviceRate, months_of_protection AS monthsOfProtection, last_sync_at AS lastSyncAt, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, create_by AS createBy, update_by AS updateBy, deleted FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id = #{activityId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_activity ( id, activity_id, activity_name, colonel_buyin_id, start_time, end_time, activity_status_code, activity_status_text, status, last_sync_at, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{colonelBuyinId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{activityStatusCode}, #{activityStatusText}, #{activityStatusText}, #{lastSyncAt}, 0, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastSyncAt} ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id) DO UPDATE SET activity_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.activity_name, colonel_activity.activity_name), colonel_buyin_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.colonel_buyin_id, colonel_activity.colonel_buyin_id), start_time = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.start_time, colonel_activity.start_time), end_time = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.end_time, colonel_activity.end_time), activity_status_code = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.activity_status_code, colonel_activity.activity_status_code), activity_status_text = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.activity_status_text, colonel_activity.activity_status_text), status = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.activity_status_text, colonel_activity.status), last_sync_at = EXCLUDED.last_sync_at, deleted = 0, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE colonel_activity SET recruiter_user_id = #{recruiterUserId}, recruiter_dept_id = #{recruiterDeptId}, assigned_at = #{assignedAt}, assigned_by = #{assignedBy}, update_time = #{assignedAt} WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select:
SELECT activity_id AS activityId, recruiter_user_id AS recruiterUserId, recruiter_dept_id AS recruiterDeptId, assigned_at AS assignedAt, assigned_by AS assignedBy, activity_status_code AS activityStatusCode, activity_status_text AS activityStatusText, last_sync_at AS lastSyncAt, activity_status_synced_at AS activityStatusSyncedAt FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id IN
#{activityId}

SELECT activity_id AS activityId, activity_name AS name FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id IN
#{activityId}

sql.if: AND ( activity_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{activityKeyword}, '%') OR activity_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{activityKeyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: id, activity_id AS activityId, activity_name AS name, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, activity_status_code AS activityStatusCode, activity_status_text AS activityStatusText, recruiter_user_id AS recruiterUserId, recruiter_dept_id AS recruiterDeptId, assigned_at AS assignedAt, assigned_by AS assignedBy, colonel_buyin_id AS colonelBuyinId, commission_rate AS commissionRate, service_rate AS serviceRate, last_sync_at AS lastSyncAt, activity_status_synced_at AS activityStatusSyncedAt, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT activity_id FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id IS NOT NULL AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND COALESCE(status, '') NOT IN ('已结束', '结束', 'CLOSED', 'ENDED', 'FINISHED', '0') AND (last_sync_at IS NULL OR last_sync_at < #{lastSyncedBefore}) ORDER BY last_sync_at ASC NULLS FIRST, update_time DESC NULLS LAST, create_time DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT extra_data FROM colonel_activity WHERE deleted = 0 AND activity_id = #{activityId} LIMIT 1
